---
title: "Climatology"
subtitle: "The science of climate systems, atmospheric processes, and global weather patterns."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include climatology/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Climatology** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include climatology/01-atmosphere-composition-structure.md >}}

{{< include climatology/02-insolation-and-heat-budget.md >}}

{{< include climatology/03-temperature-distribution.md >}}

{{< include climatology/04-atmospheric-pressure-and-circulation.md >}}

{{< include climatology/05-monsoons-and-jet-streams.md >}}

{{< include climatology/06-air-masses-and-fronts.md >}}

{{< include climatology/07-cyclones.md >}}

{{< include climatology/08-precipitation.md >}}

{{< include climatology/09-climate-classification.md >}}

{{< include climatology/10-hydrological-cycle.md >}}

{{< include climatology/11-global-warming.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include climatology/12-stability-instability-atmosphere.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include climatology/13-enso-events.md >}}

{{< include climatology/14-meteorological-hazards.md >}}

{{< include climatology/15-applied-climatology.md >}}

{{< include climatology/16-clouds.md >}}

{{< include climatology/17-local-winds.md >}}

---

## Quick Reference

{{< include climatology/19-key-scholars-climatology.md >}}

---
